# LazyKiwi

> LazyKiwi is an all-in-one AI creative studio for images and video — text-to-video, image-to-video, photo tools, templates, and top models in one workbench.

## Primary pages

- Home: https://lazykiwi.ai/
- AI photo tools: https://lazykiwi.ai/tools
- AI models: https://lazykiwi.ai/models
- Templates: https://lazykiwi.ai/templates
- Blog: https://lazykiwi.ai/blog
- Video generator: https://lazykiwi.ai/video-generator
- Image generator: https://lazykiwi.ai/image-generator
- Pricing: https://lazykiwi.ai/pricing

## Contact

- Email: hello@lazykiwi.ai
- Website: https://lazykiwi.ai

## Optional

- Sitemap: https://lazykiwi.ai/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://lazykiwi.ai/robots.txt
